---
title: "Contact"
---

## Email
[matthew.lyle@emory.edu](mailto:matthew.lyle@emory.edu)

## Office
Goizueta Business School  
Emory University  
1300 Clifton Road NE  
Atlanta, GA 30322

## Online

- {{< ai google-scholar >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ky2yVu4AAAAJ)
- {{< ai ssrn >}} [SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=922691)
- {{< ai orcid >}} [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0876-8578)
- {{< fa solid book >}} [Web of Science](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/PXY-3359-2026)
- {{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/mlyle6)
